backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for an insurance quote platform, with user profile management, quote submission, and admin-only access to submissions using an access control mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a single footer text-color change (to white) in HoustonFooter.tsx to its test ID and related components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and styling details of every component and configuration file in the Houston insurance demo app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, border, chart, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Houston insurance demo app with SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, LocalBusiness Schema.org structured data, and Google Fonts preconnect links.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that configures TanStack Router with routes for the public site, Houston demo page, and protected admin panel pages.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component with scroll-triggered fade-in animation, displaying an independent insurance advisor's personal narrative and a grid of credential stats with gold accent icons.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminAppoi: Admin page for viewing and managing appointments with list and calendar views, status filtering, and the ability to update appointment statuses.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminDashb: Admin dashboard displaying key business metrics (total leads, new leads, appointments, conversion rate) and a recent activity feed using data from admin queries.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Persistent admin layout component providing a header, responsive sidebar navigation, and logout functionality wrapping all admin pages via an Outlet.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLeads: Admin page for viewing, searching, filtering, and exporting leads to CSV, displaying them in a sortable table with coverage and text search filters.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLogin: Admin login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity and redirects to the dashboard upon successful login.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSetti: Admin settings page for viewing and updating business information (name, address, phone, license, etc.) stored via key-value backend queries.
frontend/src/components/admin/Appointmen: Renders a monthly calendar grid displaying appointments color-coded by status (scheduled, completed, cancelled), with navigation controls to move between months.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProtectedA: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the admin login page and shows an access-denied card for non-admin roles, rendering children only for verified admins.
A booking form component that lets users select a date, time slot, and enter personal info to schedule a consultation, with confirmation state and simulated submission logic.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: A contact/quote request form section with name, email, phone, message, and TCPA consent fields, featuring simulated async submission and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/EmotionalCloseSe: A CTA section highlighting three financial protection benefits with scroll-triggered fade-in animation and a button that scrolls to the contact form.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: A fixed floating button that links to a WhatsApp chat with a pre-filled insurance inquiry message, including a pulsing notification dot.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A site footer displaying business contact info, licensing details, quick navigation links, and social media icons, pulling dynamic data from the useBusinessInfo hook.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A fixed responsive navigation header with scroll-aware background, smooth-scroll nav links, a phone CTA, a booking button, and a collapsible mobile menu, using business info from a hook.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with animated fade-in, background image overlay, headline/subheadline copy, and two CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonC: Displays a grid of four insurance coverage types (Auto, Home, Life, Business) with icons and descriptions, each with a 'Get Quote' button that scrolls to the quote form.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonF: Renders the site footer with business contact info, service areas, coverage types, a portfolio pitch banner, and a copyright notice using the current hostname.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonH: Hero section with a background image, headline, CTA buttons for quote form and phone call, a trust bar, and a sticky mobile CTA that appears after scrolling 100px.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonQ: A sticky quote request form collecting name, phone, email, zip code, coverage type, and best time to call, which submits data via a mutation hook and shows toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonT: Renders a testimonials section with a carousel of three customer quotes and a fake Google Reviews widget showing a 4.9 rating.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonW: Displays a three-column 'Why Choose Us' section with icons and descriptions highlighting local service, Houston expertise, and 24/7 claims help.
frontend/src/components/MapSection.tsx: Section displaying an office location with an intersection-observer fade-in animation and a placeholder for a Google Maps iframe embed.
Grid section listing six insurance/financial services (Term Life, IUL, Whole Life, Retirement, Annuities, Business Protection), each with benefits and tax-advantage callouts, plus a CTA button to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Testimonials grid displaying five placeholder client reviews with star ratings, staggered fade-in animations on scroll, and a section heading targeting families in a configurable state.
frontend/src/components/TrustBar.tsx: Horizontal trust-signal bar showing four key stats (coverage placed, families protected, claims success rate, client satisfaction) with icons and staggered scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: Section with a placeholder video embed area (play button icon) and instructional text for inserting a YouTube/Vimeo intro video, with scroll-triggered fade-in.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Four-column benefits grid highlighting the advisor's independent advice, education-first approach, annual reviews, and claims support, with scroll-triggered staggered animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for user profile, user role, and legacy insurance site data (leads, appointments, business info); legacy backend methods return empty stubs or throw errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useBusinessInfo.ts: Composes multiple useGetBusinessInfo calls into a single hook that returns business details with fallback placeholder values.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalendarBooking.ts: Provides time slot generation, availability checking (with simulated booked slots), and a mock bookAppointment function for a calendar booking UI.
frontend/src/hooks/useHoustonQuoteSubmis: Exposes a React Query mutation hook that submits a Houston insurance quote form to the ICP backend actor via actor.submitQuote.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, identity, and status state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Contains legacy React Query hooks for lead form submission and retrieval; all backend methods are stubbed out or throw errors as they no longer exist.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter/Roboto fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for a Navy/White/Gold color system (light and dark modes), and includes utility animations and effects like glassmorphism and hover-lift.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/HoustonDemoPage.tsx: Page component that composes the Houston demo landing page by assembling Houston-specific section components: hero, why-us, coverage types, testimonials, quote form, and footer.
frontend/src/pages/PublicSite.tsx: Public-facing site page that assembles the full marketing layout with header, multiple content sections (hero, trust bar, services, testimonials, contact, map), footer, and a floating WhatsApp button.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps CSS variables to semantic color tokens, adds Houston-specific brand colors (navy/gold), configures Inter/Roboto font families, custom border radii, glow box shadows, and registers the animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking schema version, existing features, and the current task: changing the footer's bottom bar div text color to white.
